planning_request.user_request: Turn 3 (final) of a bounded three-turn, read-only PRD hardening discussion among Alfred, Claude, and agent_robin. Read the canonical PRD and turn-2 synthesis. Audit the proposed P0/P1/Post-MVP minimum robust delta for scope creep, ungrounded claims, internal contradictions, testability and user-decision leakage. Return only: final disposition (approve/revise), at most five concrete corrections, an exact ordered PRD patch outline, and the remaining explicit user decisions. Do not modify files or propose implementation.
planning_request.desired_outcome: Final reconciled PRD hardening delta that preserves Sloop-only browser MVP and avoids invented physical/performance thresholds.
previous_review_findings: Turn 1 and turn 2 artifacts are in the planning directory; turn-2 synthesis is canonical for final reconciliation.
